use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HIV INFECTION USING A COMPOSITION CONTAINING A PHARMACOKINETIC ENHANCER THAT INHIBITS CYTOCHROME P450 MONOOXYGENASE

indications.text:
1.1 Indications
Adult Patients:
TYBOST is a CYP3A inhibitor indicated to increase systemic exposure of atazanavir or
darunavir (once daily dosing regimen) in combination with other antiretroviral agents in
the treatment of HIV-1 infection in adults [see Dosage and Administration (2.1)].
Pediatric Pa...
